qa_pair.question: Using the pylon_get_me tool, what is the email address of the user that the configured PYLON_API_TOKEN belongs to?
How many distinct knowledge bases exist in the Pylon workspace? (Use pylon_get_knowledge_bases.)
List the title of every published article in the first knowledge base returned by pylon_get_knowledge_bases. How many of them are published (is_published=true)?
Find the issue with the highest number (most recent ID) created in the last 7 days using pylon_get_issues. What is its current state and assignee_id?
Using pylon_search_accounts, find the account whose name contains the substring "Acme". What is its primary domain?
How many custom fields are defined in the Pylon workspace, and how many of them have type "select"? Use pylon_get_custom_fields.
List all teams in the workspace using pylon_get_teams. Which team has the most members? Return its name.
Using pylon_get_tags, find the tag with the highest usage_count (or alphabetically first if no usage_count is exposed). What is its name?

For the most recently-created issue (in the last 24 hours), use pylon_get_issue_messages to count how many messages it has and identify the role (user vs contact) of the message author who sent the most recent message.
Using pylon_get_issue_statuses, list every status name available in the workspace. How many are in the "closed" category vs "open" category?
